violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dishes and utensils were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer and can opener were cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. The desserts were removed from self-service until properly labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and is to increase pest control as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the storage shelving area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The cutting boards in the prep unit area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
The walk-in #1 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves, walk-in cooler shelves, and 1 door reach-in shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings under and behind tables. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to increase pest control, and clean any all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Gaskets located on the the upstairs walk in cooler, freezer, and two door unit were not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
